title: RepoAccessCapability
description: Capability definition for repository access entitlements, binding consent tier, age verification, and Dead-Ledger proofs to allowed repos, invariant caps, and tier ceilings. Used by age-tier-router-policy.v1.json to compute capabilityTierMax. Aligns with Consent Profile Module (Module 1), Age-Gated Tier Router (Module 5), and Dead-Ledger/ALN entitlement hooks.

id.description: Stable identifier for this capability instance; referenced by router policy and Dead-Ledger proofs.

schemaRef.description: Schema version identifier for validator binding.

objectKind.description: Object kind for CHAT_DIRECTOR routing and manifest validation.

version.description: Semantic version; minor bumps add non-breaking fields, patch bumps fix validation logic.

holderIdentity.description: Identity fields linking this capability to a session, region, or account; shared join keys with CHAT_DIRECTOR spine.

sessionId.description: Opaque session UUID; binds capability to active consent state.

regionId.description: Region contract identifier; used for geo-policy enforcement.

descriptorId.description: Content descriptor identifier; used for invariant and style filtering.

accountId.description: Optional account-level identifier for persistent entitlements.

routerStateId.description: Reference to age-tier-routing-table.v1.json instance; enables router-policy binding.

capabilityScope.description: Defines the scope of access this capability grants: tier ceiling, repo patterns, and style/event filters.

maxAllowedTier.description: Maximum tier this capability permits; used by router policy as capabilityTierMax in effectiveTier = min(ageGateTier, consentTier, capabilityTierMax).

allowedRepoPatterns.description: Glob patterns for repos/paths this capability allows access to; e.g., 'Horror.Place/schemas/runtime/*', 'HorrorPlace-Spectral-Foundry/lua/**'.

forbiddenRepoPatterns.description: Glob patterns that are always forbidden regardless of tier; enforced by manifest routing.

allowedStyleIds.description: Optional whitelist of styleContract IDs this capability permits.

allowedEventTypes.description: Optional whitelist of eventContract stage types this capability permits.

tierCeilings.description: Per-tier numeric ceilings for invariants; referenced by router policy and H.Safety evaluation.

requiresProof.description: RESEARCH tier access requires valid repo-access-proof-envelope.v1.json attachment.

repoAccessRules.description: Fine-grained repo/path access rules; enforced by manifest routing and H.Registry.

defaultAction.description: Default action for paths not matched by explicit rules.

requiresProof.description: If true, access requires Dead-Ledger proof envelope.

pattern.description: Glob pattern for repo/path to deny.

overrideRequiresProof.description: If true, denial can only be overridden with valid proof envelope.

invariantCaps.description: Capability-level invariant caps that further constrain tier ceilings; used by H.Safety for final evaluation.

CIC.description: Optional override cap for Contextual Integrity Coherence.

AOS.description: Optional override cap for Ambient Oscillation Strength.

DET.description: Optional override cap for Dread Exposure Threshold.

SHCI.description: Optional override cap for Spectral History Coupling Intensity.

proofBinding.description: Dead-Ledger/ALN proof requirements for this capability; referenced by age-tier-router-policy.v1.json proofRequirements.

proofType.description: Type of proof required to activate this capability.

requiredClaims.description: Claims that must be present in the proof envelope (e.g., 'age_verified', 'explicit_opt_in', 'region_us_az').

proofSchemaRef.description: Reference to proof envelope schema; used for runtime validation.

verificationEndpoint.description: Optional endpoint for runtime proof verification; if omitted, verification is local via schema validation.

validityWindow.description: Temporal validity for this capability; used for session-scoped entitlements.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this capability was issued.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this capability expires; session ends or re-validation required after.

renewalPolicy.description: Policy for capability renewal after expiration.

prismMeta.description: Standard prismMeta block for schema spine alignment; shape defined in prismMeta.v1.json.

governanceRef.description: Reference to promotion-proposal or governance artifact that approved this capability.

deadLedgerRef.description: Optional Dead-Ledger attestation reference for this capability; required if proofBinding.proofType is 'research_entitlement'.
